summary: The diff introduces a production-version mismatch notice UI and a URL-parameter-controlled smoke-test overlay/checklist, and sets the backend actorVersion to v1.2.1. However, there is no evidence in the diff summary of changes that specifically promote/deploy the existing preview (Version 36) build to production, nor of fixes to any discovered production smoke-test issues. Several newly added UI/testing utilities appear to be new features beyond the stated goal of only publishing the already-implemented Version 36 changes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Promote the currently deployed preview build (Version 36) to the live/production deployment so end users see all implemented changes (member pause-request status indicator, admin notifications, pause-request approvals/denials, and auto-expiry behavior).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows code changes (version constant, new notices/overlays) but does not contain any deployment/promotion configuration or clear evidence that production will now serve the same UI/behavior as the existing preview build. No environment/deploy pipeline or canister IDs/network config changes are shown in the provided diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Perform a production smoke-test pass immediately after publishing and address any release-blocking issues discovered during verification.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff adds a smoke-test checklist/overlay UI, but there is no evidence of actual smoke-test execution or specific release-blocking bug fixes discovered during production verification. The requirement is process/validation-oriented; the diff does not demonstrate completion of the smoke-test pass or remediation.

hallucinated_features.description: Production version mismatch notice component and expected production version utilities (Version Notice UI).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest is explicitly about publishing the already-implemented Version 36 preview changes to production and avoiding new features. A new UI element that checks backend-reported version against an expected production version and displays notices is not requested as part of REQ-15/REQ-16.

hallucinated_features.description: URL-parameter-controlled in-app Production Smoke Test overlay UI and a detailed smoke-test checklist module.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-16 asks to perform smoke tests after publishing and fix issues; it does not request building a new UI overlay/checklist system accessible via a URL parameter. This is additional functionality beyond publishing the existing preview changes.
